code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import'./styles/style.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";function visitorCount(){fetch('https://api.countapi.xyz/update/drammaster.co.nz/visits/?amount=1');}async function fetchRepos(){const resp=await fetch('https://api.github.com/users/drammaster/repos');return await resp.json();}function getIcon(suffix){switch(suffix){case'Python':return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fab fa-python"});case'HTMLCSS':return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fab fa-html5"});case'React':case'ReactNative':return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fab fa-react"});case'JS':return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fab fa-js-square"});case'Angular':return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fab fa-angular"});case'TypeScript':return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fab fa-typescript"});default:return null;}}function Projects(){const[repos,setRepos]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{fetchRepos().then(setRepos);},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{id:"proj",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Projects"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{id:"repo-list",children:repos.map(repo=>{const rep=repo.name.split('-');const icon=getIcon(rep[1]);const linker="https://github.com/Drammaster/".concat(repo.name);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("li",{className:"repo_item",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{target:"_blank",rel:"noreferrer",href:linker,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h3",{children:[rep[0]," ",icon]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:repo.description})]})})},repo.id);})})]});}function About(){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{id:"aboutme",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"About me"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{id:"abouttext",children:"A passionate computer science graduate from the University of Auckland with 4 years of experience working as a climbing instructor as part of a large team fulfilling various roles. With many years of university experience working with Python, SQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript and C#, I am now looking to start my career in IT as a software developer or SalesForce developer."})]});}function SkillsTools(){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{id:"skill-tool",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{id:"skills",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Skills"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{id:"skills-list",children:['JavaScript','TypeScript','Css','HTML','React JS','ReactNative','NodeJs','Python','Sql','C#'].map(skill=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("li",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"filler-".concat(skill.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'')),children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:skill})})},skill))})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{id:"tools",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Tools"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{id:"skills-list",children:['Jira','VScode','Trello','Framer','Github','Android Studio','cypress','azure'].map(tool=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("li",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"filler-".concat(tool.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'')),children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:tool})})},tool))})]})]});}function Header(){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("header",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{id:"head-content",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Csaba Darazs"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{className:"button",href:"Csaba Darazs CV.pdf",target:"_blank",children:"View Resume"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{id:"overlay"})]});}function Main(){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("main",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(About,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Projects,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(SkillsTools,{})]});}function App(){useEffect(()=>{visitorCount();},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Header,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Main,{})]});}export default App;
